response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The reference JSON provided lyrics for an entirely different Zutomayo song than the one performed in the video ('Zankyou' / 'Time Left'). 2. JSON Usage: The lyrics in the reference JSON for Song 1 were completely wrong and therefore discarded. The lyrics for Song 2 ('Identity') matched. I performed 100% manual transcription and translation for Song 1 using my native audio perception and the burnt-in on-screen Japanese subtitles. 3. Timing & Pacing: Timed the subtitles perfectly to match the audio cues. Handled silent breaks and instrumental pauses by keeping subtitles off-screen, and applied rapid instantaneous transitions for fast-paced vocal sections to avoid cascading delays.

subtitles.original: 嫌 嫌 嫌 嫌
subtitles.english: No, no, no, no...

subtitles.original: しょっぱいぜ 初めて 吐いて 舐めた出会い
subtitles.english: It's salty, our first encounter when I threw up and tasted it

subtitles.original: 暴力的です 平均的な正論 貧ボウ
subtitles.english: It's violent, a standard logic, being poor

subtitles.original: いらっしゃいませ ニンニク増しで目指した健康体
subtitles.english: Welcome! Aiming for a healthy body with extra garlic

subtitles.original: 胃袋満たしてる
subtitles.english: Filling up my stomach

subtitles.original: 優等生 無知なフリして踊っちゃって
subtitles.english: An honor student, pretending to be ignorant and dancing

subtitles.original: 欠点です 現状把握しちゃって中断中
subtitles.english: It's a flaw, understanding the current situation and pausing

subtitles.original: もう 譲渡 見せびらかし合いました 劣等感
subtitles.english: We've already shown off our inferiority complexes to each other

subtitles.original: 変えられやしない ってわかってるから
subtitles.english: Because I know it can't be changed...

subtitles.original: 直感で自己中な理解不能プレイヤー
subtitles.english: An incomprehensible, selfish player acting on instinct

subtitles.original: 求められてたなら三次会
subtitles.english: If requested, then on to the third after-party

subtitles.original: くだらん口喧嘩でマシなんだ
subtitles.english: A stupid argument is actually better

subtitles.original: モットー、もっと？もう痛いのに
subtitles.english: My motto, more? Even though it already hurts so much

subtitles.original: うざいくらい叫んでくれちゃって
subtitles.english: Scream out loud enough to be annoying

subtitles.original: 譲れない日々よ
subtitles.english: These unyielding days...

subtitles.original: 栄養になって待ってよ こしあえ
subtitles.english: Become my nourishment and wait, I'll prepare it

subtitles.original: 残機がなくても 上がんなくても
subtitles.english: Even if I'm out of lives, even if I can't level up

subtitles.original: 脊髄反射の 涙腺は
subtitles.english: My tear ducts react from my spinal reflex

subtitles.original: 濁った声で歌えば 感謝です
subtitles.english: If I sing with a muddy voice, then thank you

subtitles.original: 試したいわ
subtitles.english: I want to try...

subtitles.original: あったかくて
subtitles.english: Warmly...

subtitles.original: 絶体絶命
subtitles.english: In a desperate situation

subtitles.original: 夜は気持ちいい
subtitles.english: The night feels so good

subtitles.original: 平凡生活
subtitles.english: My ordinary life...

subtitles.original: 夢みたけど
subtitles.english: I dreamed of it, but...

subtitles.original: 先手必勝
subtitles.english: Victory goes to the first striker

subtitles.original: 気持ちいいな
subtitles.english: It feels so good

subtitles.original: 帰ってすぐに水やり 人間の営み
subtitles.english: Watering the plants as soon as I get home, human life

subtitles.original: 実のところ恵まれても虚無感が友達
subtitles.english: Truth is, even if I'm blessed, emptiness is my friend

subtitles.original: 眠気覚まし耳打ち 飲み干すまで愛す血
subtitles.english: A wake-up whisper, the blood of love till drained

subtitles.original: 仲良し
subtitles.english: Getting along well...

subtitles.original: 仲良しの時間
subtitles.english: Our friendly time

subtitles.original: 細かいご指摘も有り難き
subtitles.english: Even detailed criticisms are much appreciated

subtitles.original: 結局 瞳孔 開いてしまうのに
subtitles.english: Even though my pupils end up dilating anyway
